abstract: Generates a hierarchical AGENTS.md knowledge base for any codebase. Discovery-scans the project tree in parallel using explore agents, Unix shell analysis (bash/find/awk/wc), and LSP symbols, then scores each directory on file count, symbol density, module boundaries, and export centrality. Produces root and subdirectory AGENTS.md files that stay under 150 lines — concise enough for LLM context windows — with no generic advice or redundant parent content.
